title: How can I choose the new 2023-10 api version with the monday.api() call of the nodejs package?
excerpt: Is there a way to decide which api to use when calling the GraphQL endpoint with monday.api()?

posts.author: Lafisrap (Michael Schmidt)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to decide which api to use when calling the GraphQL endpoint with monday.api()?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Lafisrap,

You can use something like this:

monday.api(query, {
    token,
    variables,
    apiVersion: '2023-10',
});

Cheers,
Matias
